strengths: Extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React across multiple production platforms
Strong software craftsmanship background including TDD, CI/CD, and clean architecture practices
Berlin-based with experience integrating diverse data sources and microservices at scale
concerns: Resume title and seniority (Staff/Senior) far exceed the entry-level scope of the role
PostgreSQL experience not explicit — database background skews toward MongoDB and MySQL
May be overqualified, raising retention risk for a junior/mid IC position
response.justification: The candidate brings deep fullstack expertise directly aligned with the required TypeScript, React, Node, and web architecture skills, plus relevant experience integrating CRM and automation data sources. However, their staff/senior-level trajectory significantly exceeds the entry-level scope of this position, and PostgreSQL is not explicitly demonstrated. Strong technical fit, but seniority alignment is the dominant question.
